sys_script_include.description:
This script include contains the code for all UI Actions for the Organizational tables in Tasker. All UI Actions should be in here. This file should stay read only so customers and partners can see what we are doing for UI Actions. The UI Action files should be updated to remove the code and only call these functions. The UI Actions should all be unprotected so customers and partners can do different things to meet their needs. This will allow them to seperate thier code from the core code. It will also allow them to see the differences in code between versions of Tasker to allow them to keep their code updated.
NOTE: - ONce moved to the Development environment, each UI Action needs to be checked against the UI Action code for the current UI Actions and updated appropriately.
sys_script_include.name: Organization_uiAction
